ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "link_id" TEXT /* ID of the link where the comment is posted */,
  "parent_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent comment (if any) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the comment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score representing the number of upvotes */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was published */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Unique permalink to the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "stickied" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is stickied */,
  "is_submitter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is the submitter of the link */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the linked content */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the linked content */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was submitted */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the link submission */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the linked content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., commenter, moderator, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment being moderated */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., removed, approved) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upvote_logs" (
  "upvote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upvote record */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment that received the upvote */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who upvoted the comment */,
  "upvote_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the upvote was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upvote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stickied_comments" (
  "stickied_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stickied comment record */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment that is stickied */,
  "stickied_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was stickied */,
  "stickied_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who stickied the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stickied_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag record */,
  "comment_id" TEXT /* ID of the comment that was flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the comment */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the flag was raised */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_date" TEXT /* Date when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "userReports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report record */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reported_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
